creator: c.kworr@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to John Baldwin from comment #3)

Yes, I'm running it without any changes. Typical usage looks like:

> su
# service vpnc onerestart
# route add # some route missed at remote network

As vpnc loses connections regularly and just quits this is better then enabling it in /etc/rc.conf.

And yes, unbound wasn't enabled anywhere except for /etc/resolvconf.conf. My fault, sorry.

So I think this one should be closed now.
